case_title: ***TRANSFERRED TO SANTA CLARA OUNTY***QUIXEY INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. BRENT HARRISON ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BRENT HARRISON'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE PURSUANT TO PARTIES STIPULATION. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue Pursuant To Parties Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT BRENT HARRISON's Motion To Transfer Venue Pursuant To Parties Stipulation as follows: Defendant Harrison's motion to change venue is granted pursuant to the parties' stipulation. The case is transferred to Santa Clara County and plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs. [The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.] Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
